name: Roar of Awakening
hoverSummary: Tier 95 main-hand magic weapon with 912 ability damage and 2765 accuracy.
detailLines: Main-hand magic weapon with 4-tick speed and range 8.
Shares the Song of Destruction set bonus with Ode to Deceit.
implementationNotes: Curated main-hand magic weapon from the live Roar of Awakening page. Wiki-verified with Playwright for slot, Magic requirement, damage, accuracy, speed, Soulfire special text, and Song of Destruction set linkage.
